cmd:
cd /root/eks_run
ln -sf /root/Iryna_Karmazina/.env /root/eks_run/.env
rm -f progress.json run.log
nohup /root/Iryna_Karmazina/venv/bin/python -m ekspedytor.run /root/eks_run/invoices.xlsx --mode dry-run --only-bl 263120787 --progress /root/eks_run/progress.json > run.log 2>&1 &
echo "launched pid $!"
sleep 3
echo "--- progress ---"; cat progress.json 2>/dev/null
echo "--- early log ---"; head -30 run.log 2>/dev/null
